component.name: Rein
component.summary: Use your phone as a wireless trackpad, keyboard and screen mirror for your PC

description.p: Rein turns your mobile device into a wireless trackpad, keyboard, and screen mirror for your desktop. Connect over your local network — no cable, no Bluetooth pairing required.

ul.li: Trackpad: use your phone screen as a precise touchpad
Keyboard: type on your phone and the input appears on your PC
Screen Mirror: view your desktop screen on your mobile device in real time
Wireless trackpad, keyboard and screen mirror over local network
Fixed screen capture permissions in packaged Electron executables
